_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v14: NO dedup, full data. goof 2000, leduc 9414, liars 9470, gin 1076, hex 2797, oth 2654, clob 9185. System prompts match eval. HF synced. 6 machines 540 workers collecting gin/hex/oth.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-27: v14 deployed. All system prompts verified match eval. No think blocks. Full fine-tune target.

NAVWORLD.notes: V8 batch9 ingested. 8368 canonical (+4198 this session). Batch 10 running (7x100). Target 10K. Need 1632 more.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-27: 8368 canonical. All entries pass validation. 0 duplicates across 9 batches.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 1415 canonical. Daemon running on new R2 tasks. 944 OK / 4051 attempted (23%). GPT-5.4.

LIVEWEB.notes: v20 AUDITED. 17108 entries (downsampled from 25205). Capped 200/template, removed 8097 near-dupes. 4161 unique templates. 0% think. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-27: deep audit. 46% near-dupes removed. 35 templates capped at 200. All 17108 pass validation. HF synced.

LGC-v2.notes: EXCLUDED — user directive: 4-env only, no LGC-v2/PRINT training. Data exists but not used.
LGC-v2.audit: 2026-03-19: verified 1500 entries, schema OK. EXCLUDED from training per user directive.

MEMORYGYM.notes: v4e: 20000 balanced per-event samples. Mixed tiers (lite 30%/standard 50%/hard 20%). Distribution: ingest 30%/correction 20%/question 45%/noise 5%. Median 1.5K, max 10.3K, 0% >32K. Write ≤2000 enforced. 28 unique noise responses. HF synced.
MEMORYGYM.audit: 2026-03-27: v4e. 21 self-attack rounds. All checks green. Eval composite=57.5%. SFT ceiling ~6/10.

training_mix_summary._note: 5-env mix. GAME v14 (36596), NW v8 (8368, batch 10 running to 10K), SWE-I 1415, LW v20 (deduped), MG v4e (20K balanced).

pending_tasks: NW v8 batch 10 running toward 10K (need 1632 more). SWE-I distilling on m1.
